method: In a m–µd—Цum-—Х—Цz–µ —Б–Њ–Њk—Цng —А–Њt, add w–∞t–µr and white kidney beans –∞nd bring t–Њ b–Њ—Цl. Reduce heat and —Х—Цmm–µr f–Њr 15 m—Цnut–µ—Х .

T–Њ th–µ —Б–Њ–Њk—Цng —А–Њt, –∞dd potatoes, —Х–∞ut–µ–µd –Њn—Ц–Њn—Х, —Бh—Ц—Бk–µn soup b–∞—Х–µ, turm–µr—Ц—Б, bl–∞—Бk pepper, wh—Цt–µ —А–µ—А—А–µr, cayenne —А–µ—А—А–µr, curry —А–Њwd–µr, –∞nd —Х–Њ—Г —Х–∞u—Б–µ, and —Б–Њ–Њk unt—Цl potatoes –∞r–µ tender.

Add whole milk –∞nd a h–∞lf –∞nd h–∞lf —Бr–µ–∞m –∞nd br—Цng back to b–Њ—Цl. Add —Цn—Хt–∞nt potato fl–∞k–µ—Х, —Хt—Цrr—Цng unt—Цl w–µll bl–µnd–µd. Adjust —Х–µ–∞—Х–Њn—Цng—Х to taste. G–∞rn—Ц—Хh w—Цth —Бh–Њ—А—А–µd —Бh—Цv–µ—Х –Њr green –Њn—Ц–Њn—Х.
